description: Right angle marker on a solid surface. Uses loc3d() for coordinates, either inline or as variable references.
utility: Show right angle marker at vertex on a solid

arguments.name: vertex
arguments.description: Vertex point (inline loc3d or variable reference)

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First ray endpoint (inline loc3d or variable reference)

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second ray endpoint (inline loc3d or variable reference)

examples.expression:
C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
R = solidrightangle(C, loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0), loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0), loc3d(C, 0, 0, 100), c(gray))

C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P1 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0, c(magenta))
P2 = loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0, c(magenta))
P3 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 100, c(magenta))
R = solidrightangle(C, P1, P2, P3, c(gray))
